briefdescription.para: The maximum number of Receive/Transmit-PDOs.
The maximum number of mapped application objects in a single PDO.

detaileddescription.para: This value is also the highest sub-index in the PDO mapping parameter object.

briefdescription.para: The bit in the PDO COB-ID specifying whether the PDO exists and is valid.
The bit in the PDO COB-ID specifying whether RTR is allowed.
The bit in the PDO COB-ID specifying whether to use an 11-bit (0) or 29-bit (1) CAN-ID.
The data type (and object index) of a PDO communication parameter record.
The static initializer from struct co_pdo_comm_par.
The data type (and object index) of a PDO mapping parameter record.
The static initializer from struct co_pdo_map_par.
Checks if the specified object is valid and can be mapped into a Receive-PDO.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the object index.
the object sub-index.

simplesect.para: 0 if the object is valid and can be mapped, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const co_dev_t *dev, co_unsigned16_t num, const struct co_pdo_comm_par *comm, const struct co_pdo_map_par *map)
memberdef.name: co_dev_cfg_rpdo

briefdescription.para: Configures the communication and parameters of a Receive-PDO service.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the RPDO before configuring the parameters and re-enables it on success.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]).
a pointer to the communication parameters.
a pointer to the mapping parameters.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const co_dev_t *dev, co_unsigned16_t num, const struct co_pdo_comm_par *par)
memberdef.name: co_dev_cfg_rpdo_comm

briefdescription.para: Configures the communication parameters of a Receive-PDO service by updating CANopen object 1400 - 15FF (RPDO communication parameter).

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]).
a pointer to the communication parameters.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const co_dev_t *dev, co_unsigned16_t num, const struct co_pdo_map_par *par)
memberdef.name: co_dev_cfg_rpdo_map

briefdescription.para: Configures the mapping parameters of a Receive-PDO service by updating CANopen object 1600 - 17FF (RPDO mapping parameter).

detaileddescription.para: It is the responsibility of the caller to disable the RPDO before changing the mapping.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]).
a pointer to the mapping parameters.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the specified object is valid and can be mapped into a Transmit-PDO.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the object index.
the object sub-index.

simplesect.para: 0 if the object is valid and can be mapped, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const co_dev_t *dev, co_unsigned16_t num, const struct co_pdo_comm_par *comm, const struct co_pdo_map_par *map)
memberdef.name: co_dev_cfg_tpdo

briefdescription.para: Configures the communication and parameters of a Transmit-PDO service.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the TPDO before configuring the parameters and re-enables it on success.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]).
a pointer to the communication parameters.
a pointer to the mapping parameters.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const co_dev_t *dev, co_unsigned16_t num, const struct co_pdo_comm_par *par)
memberdef.name: co_dev_cfg_tpdo_comm

briefdescription.para: Configures the communication parameters of a Transmit-PDO service by updating CANopen object 1800 - 19FF (TPDO communication parameter).

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]).
a pointer to the communication parameters.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const co_dev_t *dev, co_unsigned16_t num, const struct co_pdo_map_par *par)
memberdef.name: co_dev_cfg_tpdo_map

briefdescription.para: Configures the mapping parameters of a Transmit-PDO service by updating CANopen object 1A00 - 1BFF (TPDO mapping parameter).

detaileddescription.para: It is the responsibility of the caller to disable the TPDO before changing the mapping.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]).
a pointer to the mapping parameters.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct co_pdo_map_par *par, const co_unsigned64_t *val, co_unsigned8_t n, uint_least8_t *buf, size_t *pn)
memberdef.name: co_pdo_map

briefdescription.para: Maps values into a PDO.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the PDO mapping parameters.
a pointer to the values to map.
the number of values at val.
the address at which to store the mapped values (can be NULL).

the address of a value containing the size (in bytes) of the buffer at buf. On exit, if pn is not NULL, *pn contains the number of bytes that would have been written had the buffer at buf been sufficiently large.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct co_pdo_map_par *par, const uint_least8_t *buf, size_t n, co_unsigned64_t *val, co_unsigned8_t *pn)
memberdef.name: co_pdo_unmap

briefdescription.para: Unmaps a PDO into its constituent values.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the PDO mapping parameters.
a pointer to the mapped values.
the number of bytes at buf.
the address at which to store the unmapped values (can be NULL).

the address of a value containing the size (in number of values) of the buffer at val. On exit, if pn is not NULL, *pn contains the number of values that would have been written had the buffer at val been sufficiently large.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct co_pdo_map_par *par, co_dev_t *dev, struct co_sdo_req *req, const uint_least8_t *buf, size_t n)
memberdef.name: co_pdo_dn

briefdescription.para: Writes mapped PDO values to the object dictionary through a local SDO download request.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the PDO mapping parameters.
a pointer to a CANopen device.
a pointer to the CANopen SDO download request used for writing to the object dictionary.
a pointer to the mapped values.
the number of bytes at buf.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct co_pdo_map_par *par, const co_dev_t *dev, struct co_sdo_req *req, uint_least8_t *buf, size_t *pn)
memberdef.name: co_pdo_up

briefdescription.para: Reads mapped PDO values from the object dictionary through a local SDO upload request.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the PDO mapping parameters.
a pointer to a CANopen device.
a pointer to the CANopen SDO upload request used for reading from the object dictionary.
the address at which to store the mapped values (can be NULL).

the address of a value containing the size (in bytes) of the buffer at buf. On exit, if pn is not NULL, *pn contains the number of bytes that would have been written had the buffer at buf been sufficiently large.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

briefdescription.para: This header file is part of the CANopen library; it contains the Process Data Object (PDO) declarations.

detaileddescription.para:
